mapper.select:
select ss.id, ss.staff_id, ss.dept_id, ss.work_date, ss.shift_id, ss.campus_id, ss.status, ss.type, ss.start_time, ss.end_time,
si.name as staffName, si.images as staffImages,
di.dept_name, poi.name as positionName
from staff_schedule ss left join staff_info si on (si.id = ss.staff_id) left join dept_info di on (di.id = si.dept_id) left join position_info poi on (poi.id = si.position_id)
where 1 = 1 order by id desc
